description: Catalog smoke tests for the Bitcoin pack. Each case asserts that a representative visitor query lands on a specific authored leaf via the catalog navigator. All 8 branches are now fully built: austrian-monetary, core-internals, lightning, privacy, mining-pow, wallets-keys, whitepaper-precursors, operational-questions.

cases.query: what is sound money
explain the regression theorem and how bitcoin satisfies it
why does the cantillon effect matter for bitcoin
why does every fiat currency eventually get inflated
what is the 21 million cap and why does it matter
is bitcoin a unit of account or just a store of value
what does the austrian theory of the business cycle say about credit expansion
explain the utxo model and how it differs from accounts
what is the mempool and how does replace by fee work
tell me about consensus rules and why soft forks are preferred over hard forks
how does a miner build a candidate block and what is the coinbase
how do bitcoin nodes find peers and what defends against eclipse attacks
what is initial block download and the chainstate database
what does pruning a node actually do
explain segwit witness commitments inside the coinbase
what does mises say about debasement of money
why is gresham's law relevant to bitcoin pricing
how does child-pays-for-parent help unstick a transaction
what is bip-9 version bits signaling
why is the supply schedule fixed in code instead of by a central authority
explain how a lightning payment channel works with the funding transaction
what is an htlc and how does sphinx onion routing keep payments private
how does the lightning gossip protocol propagate the channel graph
what is a watchtower and why do offline lightning channels need one
explain channel splicing and how routing fees work on lightning
what is a lightning service provider and how do jit channels work
what is the difference between cooperative close and force close on lightning
how does multi-path payment let lightning route a large amount
what is coinjoin and how does it improve privacy
explain payjoin and how bip78 breaks the common-input-ownership heuristic
what are silent payments and how do they work
how does taproot improve privacy on chain
what do chain analysis firms actually see on the blockchain
why is address reuse bad for privacy
why does bitcoin use proof of work instead of proof of stake
how does the difficulty adjustment work and what happens when hashrate drops
are asics centralizing bitcoin mining
explain how mining pools work and what stratum v2 changes
what is the security budget problem after the subsidy decays
how much energy does bitcoin actually use and where does it come from
how do hd wallets work with bip32 derivation paths
what is a bip39 seed phrase and what does the passphrase do
explain output descriptors and why they matter
what should i look for in a hardware signer
how does a 2-of-3 multisig actually protect against theft and loss
how do i set up bitcoin inheritance for my heirs
explain the bitcoin whitepaper and what it actually contributed
what is hashcash and how is it related to bitcoin mining
tell me about wei dai's b-money proposal
what was nick szabo's bit gold concept
explain hal finney's reusable proofs of work rpow
who were the cypherpunks and how do they connect to bitcoin
